domain: Bhutanese Cham mask dance (Vajrayana Buddhism, Bhutan/Tibet, monastic ceremony): 4-day progression with preparation/main/peak/release stages; per-stage canonical mask roles assigned to monks; daily phase rotation 4-quadrant pattern; monastery orchestra synchronizes the stages; pre-dance purification ritual gate.
specific_mechanism: CHAM-P-4DAY-K-ROLE-R-QUAD-A-ORCH-G-PURIFY: (1) P_4day 4-day stage progression; (2) K_role per-stage canonical mask role; (3) R_quad daily 4-quadrant phase rotation; (4) A_orch monastery-orchestra anchor; (5) G_purify pre-dance purification gate.
llm_application: CHAM mechanism + P_4day + K_role + R_quad + A_orch + G_purify. Differs from R577/R502/R515/R527/R540/R552/R565. Differs from MultiTurnEval + LLMSocialAgents + LLMOrbit + AgentMemoryInfra + AwesomeAgent by 4-day + per-stage mask + quad rotation + orchestra anchor + purify gate.
novelty_claim: Multi-turn phase-coherence literature broad. CHAM adds 5-mechanism composite. K=5.
